title: Retirement Savings Calculator - Plan Your Future
description: Free retirement savings calculator. Estimate how much you need to save for retirement based on your age, income, and goals. Start planning today.
keywords: retirement savings calculator, retirement planner, 401k calculator, retirement fund, savings goal calculator
intro: Plan your retirement by calculating how much you need to save monthly to reach your retirement goal.

faq.q: How much do I need for retirement?
faq.a: A common rule is to save 25x your annual expenses. If you spend $50,000/year, aim for $1.25 million in retirement savings.
The earlier the better. Starting at 25 vs 35 can mean hundreds of thousands more due to compound interest.
The 4% rule suggests you can withdraw 4% of your retirement savings annually without running out of money over 30 years.
